# Resume Customizer

> AI-powered web app that tailors your resume to any job description.

Resume Customizer helps job seekers paste a job description, upload a resume (PDF or DOCX),
and receive a customized version with semantic ATS match scoring, matched keywords,
missing keyword suggestions, and downloadable results.

## Main URLs

- Home: https://resume-customizer-app.vercel.app/
- About: https://resume-customizer-app.vercel.app/about
- Contact: https://resume-customizer-app.vercel.app/contact
- Privacy Policy: https://resume-customizer-app.vercel.app/privacy
- Terms of Service: https://resume-customizer-app.vercel.app/terms

## What this site does

- Parses PDF and DOCX resumes
- Compares resume content to job descriptions using semantic ATS analysis
- Rewrites summary, skills, and experience bullets to match the role
- Returns match score, matched keywords, and improvement tips

## Optional

- robots.txt: https://resume-customizer-app.vercel.app/robots.txt
- sitemap: https://resume-customizer-app.vercel.app/sitemap.xml
